poll.question: After her confession, should Jade pursue Ryan—or trust Marcus?

options.label: Follow her heart
options.desc: Be honest with Ryan—let the spark grow

options.label: Hold the anchor
options.desc: Reassure Marcus—lean on his steady presence

options.label: Take time alone
options.desc: Ask them both for space to understand herself

in_play.label: Mischief
in_play.desc: let teasing, play and lightness in
